summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PDF generation feature. All backend APIs working perfectly (27/27 tests passed). Frontend PDF download buttons render correctly with navy blue styling, bilingual text, and download icons. Integration between backend and frontend is seamless.
passed_tests: POST /api/generate-pdf with inline profile (returns success, pdf_url, pdf_id, eligible_count, results)
POST /api/generate-pdf with user_id (fetches profile from DB and generates PDF)
Profiler completion auto-generates PDF and includes pdf_url in response
Frontend PDF download buttons render with correct navy blue styling and data-testid
PDF buttons show Hindi+English bilingual text with download icons
Previous features work: eligibility cards, MCP tool traces, text chat, scheme cards
All authentication and navigation flows working
All eligibility matcher functionality working with various income/age scenarios
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (27/27), Frontend: 95% (PDF buttons working, minor navigation complexity)
